purpose: RealVisXL separated-hand robustness profile using a palms-down tabletop pose to retest finger spacing, wrists, sleeves, and contact shadows.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic editorial portrait of an adult subject seated at a plain wooden table, both hands separated and fully visible palms-down on the tabletop, relaxed straight fingers with natural spacing, ten clear fingers, accurate knuckles, fingernails, wrist anatomy, realistic skin folds at finger joints, clean sleeve cuffs ending above the wrists, tailored jacket fabric with visible weave, clear contact shadows beneath fingers and wrists, calm natural facial expression, lifelike eyes, realistic skin pores, soft studio window lighting, realistic shadows, 70mm portrait lens, photographic color grading
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, CGI, doll-like face, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed texture, clasped hands, interlocked fingers, folded hands, hidden hands, cropped hands, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, webbed fingers, duplicated thumb, broken wrist, twisted wrist, distorted nails, melted fingertips, warped sleeves, cloth melting into skin, bad anatomy, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, logo

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Uses a simpler palms-down tabletop pose with relaxed straight fingers to reduce fingertip compression at contact points.
